lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਟੀ ਕਉ ਜਲੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਤਿਆਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: maattee kau jal deh dis tiaagai |
lines.english: The water runs away from the dust in all directions.
The feet are above, and the sky is beneath.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
The fire runs away from the fuel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜੀਅ ਭਗਤਨ ਕੈ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਮਨ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਜਾਪਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nimakh na bisarai jeea bhagatan kai aatth pehar man taa kau jaap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His devotees do not forget Him, even for an instant. Twenty-four hours a day, O mind, meditate on Him. ||1||Pause||
Such is our all-powerful dear Lord.
The ocean appears in the cup. ||1||
The dirt cleans the soap.
First comes the butter, and then the milk.
The Lord of the world does all these things.
The fearless are afraid of fear.
The living are killed by the dead. ||2||
The visible body is hidden, and the etheric body is seen.
The one who is cheated, is not cheated by the cheat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਵਖਰ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਉਠਿ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin vakhar fir fir utth laagai |3|
lines.english: With no merchandise, the trader trades again and again. ||3||
So join the Society of the Saints, and chant the Lord's Name.
Rare are those who contemplate and meditate on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੪੩॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kee param gat hoe |4|43|54|
lines.english: O Nanak, they attain the supreme status. ||4||43||54||
So say the Simritees, Shaastras, Vedas and Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਆਨ ਬੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa har kee saranaaee prabh bin naahee aan beea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Forever and ever, I seek the Sanctuary of the Lord.There is none other than God. ||1||Pause||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Whatever pleases Him happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤ੍ਰੁ ਲਖਿਮੀ ਦੀਸੈ ਇਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: put kalatru lakhimee deesai in meh kichhoo na sang leea |
lines.english: You look upon your children, spouse and wealth; none of these will go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਵਿਗੂਤਾ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nindaa kar kar bahut vigootaa garabh jon meh kirat peaa |
lines.english: Slandering others, you are totally ruined; because of your past actions, you shall be consigned to the womb of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੈ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਖਾਇ ਭੁਲਾਨਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bikhai tthgauree khaae bhulaanaa maaeaa mandar tiaag geaa |1|
lines.english: Eating the poisonous potion, you have gone astray. You will have to go, and leave Maya and your mansions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਬ ਕਮਾਣੇ ਛੋਡਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਮਦੂਤਿ ਗ੍ਰਾਸਿਓ ਮਹਾ ਭਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: purab kamaane chhoddeh naahee jamadoot graasio mahaa bheaa |2|
lines.english: Your past actions will not just go away; the most horrible Messenger of Death shall seize you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੈ ਝੂਠੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਅਵਰਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਹਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bolai jhootth kamaavai avaraa trisan na boojhai bahut heaa |
lines.english: You tell lies, and do not practice what you preach. Your desires are not satisfied - what a shame.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਾਧ ਰੋਗੁ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਸੰਤ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਦੇਹ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਮਹਾ ਖਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: asaadh rog upajiaa sant dookhan deh binaasee mahaa kheaa |3|
lines.english: You have contracted an incurable disease; slandering the Saints, your body is wasting away; you are utterly ruined. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਹਿ ਨਿਵਾਜੇ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਸਾਜੇ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਨੇ ਸੰਤ ਜਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jineh nivaaje tin hee saaje aape keene sant jeaa |
lines.english: He embellishes those whom He has fashioned. He Himself gave life to the Saints.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਮਇਆ ॥੪॥੪੪॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kantth laae raakhe kar kirapaa paarabraham meaa |4|44|55|
lines.english: O Nanak, He hugs His slaves close in His Embrace. Please grant Your Grace, O Supreme Lord God, and be kind to me as well. ||4||44||55||
Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, I am enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa simaran birathaa na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditation on Him is not wasted. ||1||Pause||
Such is the Perfect Divine Guru, my help and support.
and so all the affairs of my body are arranged and resolved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਕਾਟੈ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee dhoor kaattai jam jaal |
lines.english: The dust of His feet snaps the noose of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਬਸੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal base mere man ke |
lines.english: His lotus feet dwell within my mind,
Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||2||
He is the Savior of sinners, the treasure of mercy.
My God is the Master of the masterless.
One upon whom He places His Hand, is protected.
renounces corruption; his egotistical pride is dispelled.
One whom He blesses with His Immaculate Mantra,
Meditate on the One Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
The treasure of virtue pervades and permeates each and every heart.
Sins are erased, through the love of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
The Guru, the Transcendent Lord, dwells among all.
O God, I place my hopes in You. Nanak continually offers this true prayer. ||4||45||56||
Please grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan;
